prompt:
Subject: Important Security Update Regarding Your Account

Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are having a wonderful day! At Global Trust Bank, your security is our top priority. We have detected a series of unusual login attempts from an unrecognized device in a foreign location.

To ensure your funds remain safe, we have temporarily restricted access to your online banking portal. To restore full access and confirm your identity, please click the secure link below and follow the prompts to verify your credentials:

https://globaltrustbank-security-portal.net/login-verification

Please complete this verification within the next 4 hours to prevent permanent account suspension.

Thank you for choosing Global Trust Bank!

Warm regards,

The Global Trust Security Team

URGENT: Order #88291 is pendng! We could not proces your paymnt. To avoid cancelation of your order, you must update your credit card info immediatly at: http://bit.ly/secure-pay-update-99. Failure to do so will resut in a $50 fee.

Subject: URGENT: Order #88291 Problm!

We have enountered a problem with your recent order confirmation. To avoid cancelation of your order, you must verify your bank details imediately at: http://bank-secure-update-portal.net/login

Failure to act within 2 hours will result in permanent account suspension.
